name: Sourcegraph Cody
description: Cody is an AI coding assistant from Sourcegraph that understands your entire codebase across repositories. Provides context-aware completions, explains complex code, generates tests, and fixes bugs. Indexes your organizations code for accurate answers.
shortDesc: AI coding assistant with full codebase awareness

name: Tabnine
description: Tabnine is an AI code completion assistant with privacy as priority, offering local models for security-conscious teams. Supports 90+ languages and 15+ IDEs. On-premise deployment available for enterprise security requirements.
shortDesc: Privacy-first AI code completion with local models

name: Codeium (Windsurf)
description: Codeium is a free AI code assistant with unlimited completions, supporting 70+ languages and 40+ IDEs. Features include search across repositories, chat-based AI assistance, and the Windsurf AI IDE for agentic coding. No credit card required.
shortDesc: Free AI code assistant with unlimited completions

name: Amazon Q Developer
description: Amazon Q Developer (formerly CodeWhisperer) is AWS AI coding assistant specializing in AWS infrastructure code. Provides real-time code suggestions, security vulnerability scanning, and infrastructure as code generation. Free for individual devs.
shortDesc: AWS-native AI coding assistant with security scanning

name: Zed AI
description: Zed is a high-performance code editor built in Rust with AI pair programming. Uses Claude and GPT for inline transformations and code generation. Assistant panel provides chat with codebase context. Sub-millisecond startup.
shortDesc: High-performance Rust editor with AI pair programming

name: VEED.io
description: VEED.io is a browser-based AI video editor with automatic subtitles, background removal, noise reduction, and eye contact correction. Supports screen recording and social media formatting. Professional features without installation.
shortDesc: Browser-based AI video editor with auto subtitles

name: Opus Clip
description: Opus Clip is an AI video repurposing tool that extracts viral clips from long videos. Identifies the most engaging moments, auto-generates clips with subtitles and layouts optimized for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts. Saves hours of manual editing.
shortDesc: AI that turns long videos into viral short clips

name: CapCut
description: CapCut is ByteDance free video editing app with AI features for social media creators. AI tools include auto captions, text-to-speech, background removal, motion tracking, and AI portraits. Millions of templates. TikTok integrated.
shortDesc: Free AI-powered video editor with TikTok integration

name: Klap
description: Klap is an AI clipping tool that transforms long videos into short-form content. Finds important moments, adds dynamic captions with effects, and formats for TikTok, Reels, and Shorts. Ideal for podcasters and educators.
shortDesc: AI short-form video clipper with dynamic captions

name: InVideo AI
description: InVideo AI creates complete videos from text prompts with scenes, voiceover, music, and transitions. Offers 5000+ templates, AI script writing, text-to-speech, and auto-captioning. Turns articles into videos instantly.
shortDesc: AI video generator from text prompts

name: Pictory AI
description: Pictory automatically turns long-form content into short branded videos. Extracts key highlights from articles, scripts, or videos and generates clips with captions. Features include automatic storyboarding and text-based editing.
shortDesc: AI video creator that turns content into branded clips

name: Anyword
description: Anyword is an AI copywriting platform for marketing teams that predicts content performance before publishing. Scores copy effectiveness and suggests improvements for higher conversions. Supports email campaigns, landing pages, and ads.
shortDesc: AI copywriting with predictive performance scoring

name: Phrasee
description: Phrasee is an AI platform for brand language optimization, specializing in email subject lines, push notifications, and social media copy. Uses deep learning to generate and test marketing language that resonates and drives conversions.
shortDesc: AI brand language optimization for email and push

name: Writer AI
description: Writer is an enterprise AI platform for consistent brand messaging across organizations. Enforces style guides, tone, and terminology while generating content. Features include Palmyra LLM, compliance checks, and marketing workflow integration.
shortDesc: Enterprise AI platform for brand-consistent content

name: Surfer SEO
description: Surfer SEO is an AI-powered content optimization platform for higher search rankings. Analyzes top-ranking pages and gives data-driven recommendations for content structure, keyword usage, and NLP terms. Features include content editor and audit.
shortDesc: AI content optimization for higher search rankings

name: Frase AI
description: Frase is an AI content research and SEO writing tool. Analyzes SERPs to build content briefs with key questions and topics. Features include AI writing with source citations, content scoring, and Google Search Console integration.
shortDesc: AI content research and SEO writing assistant

name: Resemble AI
description: Resemble AI is a professional AI voice cloning and audio generation platform. Creates ultra-realistic voice clones from minutes of audio with emotional variation. Features include TTS, voice-to-voice conversion, and deepfake detection.
shortDesc: Professional AI voice cloning and audio generation

name: PlayHT
description: PlayHT is a powerful TTS platform with 900+ ultra-realistic voices across 140+ languages. Generates human-like speech with natural pauses and emotions. Features include voice cloning, pronunciation customization, SSML support, and streaming API.
shortDesc: 900+ AI voices for realistic text-to-speech

name: WellSaid Labs
description: WellSaid Labs produces studio-quality AI voiceovers for professional use. Avatars deliver natural speech with customizable pacing and emphasis. Features team collaboration, SSML support, and API integration. Used by major corporations.
shortDesc: Studio-quality AI voiceover platform

name: Listnr AI
description: Listnr AI is a text-to-speech platform with 600+ voices across 75+ languages. Generates voiceovers, podcasts, and audiobooks. Features include voice cloning, SSML support, embeddable audio player, and team collaboration.
shortDesc: Multi-language TTS platform with 600+ voices

name: Voicemod AI
description: Voicemod is a real-time AI voice changer for gaming, streaming, and content creation. Transforms your voice into hundreds of characters and effects in real-time. Features include Voice AI Lab for custom creation and soundboard integration.
shortDesc: Real-time AI voice changer for gaming and streaming

name: AudioPen AI
description: AudioPen AI transforms raw spoken thoughts into clean, structured written content. Speak naturally and AI rewrites your voice notes into emails, blog posts, summaries, and social media posts. Great for capturing ideas on the go.
shortDesc: AI voice-to-text that turns rambles into polished writing

name: AIVA AI Music
description: AIVA is an AI music composition assistant that creates original soundtracks for videos, games, and advertisements. Composes in various styles from classical to electronic. Used by content creators needing royalty-free music.
shortDesc: AI music composition for soundtracks and content

name: You.com
description: You.com is an AI search engine combining web search with AI chat and code generation. Offers multiple AI models, privacy-focused search, and app integrations for productivity. Supports both casual queries and developer workflows.
shortDesc: AI search engine with chat and code generation

name: Consensus
description: Consensus is an AI academic search engine that searches over 200 million peer-reviewed research papers. Provides evidence-based answers with citation-backed responses and shows consensus across studies. Essential for researchers.
shortDesc: AI academic search engine for research papers

name: Elicit AI
description: Elicit automates literature review tasks. Searches papers, extracts key findings, summarizes conclusions, and organizes references. Helps researchers quickly understand the academic landscape on any topic. AI-powered research assistant.
shortDesc: AI research assistant for automated literature review

name: Phind
description: Phind is an AI search engine for developers and technical professionals. Answers technical questions with up-to-date code examples and documentation. Provides internet-connected answers with code snippet generation and explanation.
shortDesc: AI search engine for developers and technical answers

name: Komo AI
description: Komo AI is a privacy-focused, ad-free AI search engine providing direct answers without tracking. Offers web search with AI summaries, chat mode, and explore mode. No ads, no tracking, fast results. Clean and minimal interface.
shortDesc: Privacy-focused AI search engine without ads
